# The Ultimate Portfolio  
Data API

Access enterprise-grade data across 50+ chains with a single, powerful GraphQL API.

Get Your API Key[Read Documentation](/docs/api/)

## Built for developers

Stop building indexing infrastructure. Start shipping products.

### Build Faster

Skip months of infrastructure work. Access ready-to-use blockchain data instantly.

### Complete Coverage

One API for everything onchain. Tokens, NFTs, DeFi, transactions, and social data across 50+ chains.

### Battle-Tested

Enterprise-grade infrastructure that has powered leading applications since 2019.

Join thousands of developers building with the Zapper API

Get Your API Key
